characters.name: .GIFfany
characters.description: .GIFfanyBackground informationShowsGravity FallsVideo gamesDisney Heroes: Battle Mode(as a badge)VoiceJessica DiCiccoInspirationJapanese anime and manga, particularly yandere archetypesCharacter informationOccupationStudent (in-game)HomeRomance Academy 7LikesSoos, attention, compliments, loveDislikesReal girls (especiallyMelody), rejection, lack of attention, competitors for Soos' affection, when the game is offPowers and abilitiesElectronic manipulationElectricity conduit travelStatusPresumably deceasedFamily informationParent(s)Octopus dad (mentioned)Source.GIFfany[1]is a one-time antagonist fromDisney ChannelandDisney XD'sGravity Fallsand appeared in the episode "Soos and the Real Girl", where she serves as the main antagonist. .GIFfany is a self-aware Artificial Intelligence created from a Japanese dating simulator called "Romance Academy 7." When the programmers of the game attempted to delete her due to her obsessive programming, she "deleted" them instead, implying that she killed them. Much later, the game she was in found its way to a video game store inGravity Falls, Oregon. .GIFfany comes across as innocent, caring, and friendly towards those she becomes infatuated with. But in actuality, she is an extremely paranoid and possessive creature. She is willing to kill people, including the person she loves if she doesn't get her way. .GIFfany pretends to be nice and sweet wheneverSoosis around, however, this front is impermanent as shown when she quickly becomes furious because Soos wanted to spend time away from her.

22Background informationFeature filmsSoulShort films22 vs. EarthVideo gamesDisney Emoji BlitzDisney Tsum TsumKingdom Hearts Union χ(Medal)Disney Heroes: Battle ModeDisney Magic KingdomsDisney POP TOWN(costume)VoiceTina FeyJamie Foxx(when imitating Joe Gardner)Sloane Murray(kid voice)Edward Asner(old man voice)InspirationSoulsCharacter informationOther namesJoe Gardner(when in his body)HomeThe Great Before(formerly)EarthLikesEarth, dancing, mimicking Joe, life, pizza, music, lollipops, food, shushing people, having a conversation with others, annoying others (formerly)DislikesEarth (formerly), being told she has no purpose, being yelled at, failing, music (formerly)Powers and abilitiesVocal manipulationShapeshiftingEnhanced strength(as a lost soul)StatusBornSource22is the deuteragonist ofDisney•Pixar's2020animated feature film,Soul. AfterJoeaccidentally arrived at theGreat Before, he seeks help from 22 to get him back to his body before it's too late. While by Joe’s side, 22 learns what it means and feels like to be alive. 22 (the 22nd soul ever created) is a precocious soul who has spent hundreds of years at The You Seminar, where new souls must meet several requirements before going to Earth. Like every soul before her, 22 has been through the Personality Pavilions, which explains her endearing sarcasm, quick wit and occasional moodiness. She’s met every requirement to go to Earth—except one. But no matter how many visits she makes to the Hall of Everything, no matter how many esteemed luminaries have mentored her, she can’t find the spark she needs to fulfill her requirements and make her way to Earth. That’s fine with 22; the truth is—she’s not interested in life on Earth at all. The only thing known about 22 is that she has spent eons in the Great Before, and the amount of years she spent there resulted in her dim view of life on Earth.

characters.name: 4D-M1N
characters.description: 4D-M1NBackground informationShowsStar Wars ResistanceVoiceMary Elizabeth McGlynnCharacter informationFull name4D-M1NOther names4DOccupationCommand bridge droidAffiliationsResistanceTeam ColossusHomeColossusLikesServing Captian DozaDislikespirates, First OrderPowers and abilitiesAttack modeHand-to-hand combatParaphernaliaHiddenblastersin shoulders and wristsStatusActiveFamily informationOwner(s)Doza familySource4D-M1N, nicknamed4D, was a TDA-series droid assistant, known as command bridge droid, who assisted and worked as a protocol droid forImanuel Doza, the captain of theColossusplatform on the planet Castilon. While often residing in Doza Tower, she occasionally left to perform tasks for the station's captain, including his bodyguard and chief security with the Colossus security droid all answer to her and will alert her if one is missing or disabled. TheFirst Order's interest in the station ultimately resulted in her destruction, when she was shot down by CommanderPyrewhile she attempted to defend Captain Doza from being placed under arrest. After theColossusescaped from a First Order attack into hyperspace, 4D-M1N was repaired. This character article is astub. You canhelpDisney Wiki byexpanding it. 627Background informationFeature filmsLilo & Stitch(2025)(cameo)Short filmsThe Origin of StitchShowsLilo & Stitch: The SeriesStitch!Video gamesDisney Tsum TsumPark attractionsHuli Huli Ohana BashVoiceChris SandersBen Diskin(Stitch!; English dub)InspirationStitchCharacter informationOccupationJumba's 627th experimentGantu's sidekick (formerly)AffiliationsDisney VillainsHomeGantu's Ship(briefly)LikesPower, chaos, destruction, evil, bullying, laughing, being better thanStitchand his "cousins", winning, pizza, sandwiches, space scooter (Stitch!)DislikesGoodness, Stitch,Reuben, getting fired, being outsmarted, losing, anyone killing Stitch other than him (Stitch!)Powers and abilitiesAll the powers ofStitchIce beamElectrical power surgeTelekinesisPlasma blastsShooting spikesRotating clawsFire breathStatusDehydratedFamily informationCreator(s)Jumba JookibaOther relativesExperiments("cousins")SourceExperiment 627is an illegalgenetic experimentcreated byJumba Jookiba, and the first experiment to be created on Earth with limited alien technology. He serves as a minor antagonist inLilo & Stitch: The Series, and is designed to be a better prototype ofStitch. Unlike the other known experiments (with the exception ofLeroy), it is impossible for him to be rehabilitated, so he was dehydrated without ever being given a name or one true place. All the powers ofStitchIce beamElectrical power surgeTelekinesisPlasma blastsShooting spikesRotating clawsFire breath Experiment 627 was the 627th genetic experiment created byJumba, and the second to be made withoutHämsterviel's funding. He was designed to have all ofStitch's powers, including those of 20 other experiments, with none of their weaknesses.

characters.name: 80's Robot
characters.description: 80's RobotBackground informationFeature filmsThe MuppetsMuppets Most WantedShowsThe MuppetsPortrayed byMatt VogelInspirationOmnibot 2000R.O.B.Character informationOccupationServant to Kermit the FrogLikesKermit, helping outDislikesDisaster, muggersStatusActiveSource '80s Robotis a robot character who debuted in the2011filmThe Muppets. Unlike the principal Muppet characters, '80s Robot was designed and built by Legacy Effects. He lives in Kermit's mansion, working as a valet or manservant to Kermit after the break up of the Muppets. '80s Robot also functions as a chauffeur, and uses his databanks and search engine to locate the Muppet troupe using a dial-up modem. He uses slang from the era, and offers such dated beverages as Tab and New Coke to those he meets. As his name implies, the character resembles the many robots who dominated the toy, novelty, and pop culture landscape in the 1980s,[1] which include the Omnibot 2000 made by Tomy, and Nintendo's ROB accessory.

characters.name: 9-Eye
characters.description: 9-EyeBackground informationPark attractionsThe TimekeeperBuzz Lightyear Laser BlastVoiceRhea PerlmanMiriam Boyer (French version)Character informationOccupationTime-travelerAssistant to the TimekeeperAffiliationsMetropolis Institute of Time TravelStatusActiveSource9-Eyewas the deuteragonist ofThe Timekeeper. 9-Eye was the assistant toTimekeeper, and the one who recorded the time travel experiment for the attraction riders. She was his latest development and travelled with him to the Metropolis Science Institute inTomorrowlandand the Visionarium in Discoveryland to show off their technology. When Le Visionarium closed inDisneyland Parisin2004, the 9-Eye prop was moved to the first room ofBuzz Lightyear Laser Blast, as a reference to the attraction that existed in that place years prior. She can be seen behind Boxobot in the first scene.

characters.name: 90's Adventure Bear
characters.description: 90's Adventure BearBackground informationShowsPickle and PeanutVoiceShaquille O'Neal(Season 1)Mark Henry (Season 2)InspirationBaloo(as seen inTaleSpin)Character informationOther namesNinetiesBearStatusActiveFamily informationParent(s)70's Adventure Bear (father)Partner(s)Susan (wife)Source90's Adventure Bearis a character featured in theDisney XDshow,Pickle and Peanut. He is the title character of his own TV show and the leader of the 90's Adventure Team.PickleandPeanutcherish him as their favorite childhood hero. 90's Adventure Bear first appears in theepisode of the samename. While Pickle and Peanut are attending an outdoor garage sale, Nineties shows up eating a jar of mixed fruit. When Nineties spills fruit juice from jar onto his bathrobe and says "Runkledunk", Peanut recognizes this as Nineties' signature catchphrase from his TV show. Pickle and Peanut introduce themselves, telling Nineties about how much they enjoyed his show. Nineties tells them he hasn't been doing any adventures nowadays and that he's down on his luck. In an attempt to get Nineties' spirit of adventure back, Pickle and Peanut pretended to be Zip Skyboard and Major Manslaughter.

characters.name: A-Lan
characters.description: A-LanBackground informationFeature filmsZombies 3Portrayed byMatt CornettCharacter informationFull nameA-LanOther namesLanOccupationStudentCheerleaderAffiliationsSeabrook HighHomeSeabrook (currently)The Mothership (formerly)LikesCompetitions, chocolate fro-yoDislikesOther zombies (possibly)Powers and abilitiesLevitationElectrokinesisInvisibilityPsionicsTelekinesisTelepathyTeleportationForce Field/Shield CreationParaphernaliaLuma Lens BraceletStatusActiveFamily informationParent(s)Unnamed parentsOther relativesThe AliensPartner(s)A-LiSourceA-Lanis an alien from theZombiesfranchise. A-Lan is one of the main characters inZombies 3. He is portrayed byMatt Cornett. A-Lan is another member of the Alien trio, A-Lan enjoys competition, especially against the less intelligent and less athletic students at Seabrook High. A-Lan is a male alien with short blue hair styled in a quiff, teal eyes and light skin. A-Lan wears a blue and silver jumpsuit, blue vest, Luma Lens bracelet, and blue boots. Like all Aliens, A-Lan has silver markings on the side of his face.

characters.name: A-Spen
characters.description: A-SpenBackground informationFeature filmsZombies 3ShowsZombies: The Re-Animated SeriesVoiceTerry HuPortrayed byTerry HuInspirationAliensCharacter informationFull nameA-SpenOther namesSpenOccupationLeader of the AliensStudentCheerleaderMusicianSingerAffiliationsSeabrook High SchoolHomeSeabrook(currently)The Mothership (formerly)LikesA-Lan,A-Li, the Aliens, their friends,Willa Lykensen, learning and music,Dramatic House SpousesDislikesBad zombiesPowers and abilitiesIntelligenceLevitationElectrokinesisInvisibilityPsionicsTelekinesisTelepathyTeleportationForce Field/Shield CreationParaphernaliaLuma Lens BraceletStatusActiveFamily informationOther relativesThe AliensPartner(s)Willa Lykensen(mate)Zed Necrodopolis(former crush)SourceA-Spenis a non-binary alien fromDisney'sZombiesfranchise. They are one the main characters in theDisney+original movieZombies 3. A-Spen is a super-intelligent, telepathic alien who, after arriving on Earth, finds an uncommon emotion entering their bloodstream: Love. A-Spen is very excitable, they like to feel many emotions.

characters.name: A.B.E.
characters.description: A.B.E.Background informationVideo gamesEpic Mickey 2: The Power of TwoVoiceUnknownPortrayed byUnknownInspirationRobotCharacter informationFull nameAutomatic Branch EngineerOccupationHost of the Train TunnelsHomeRobotlandParaphernaliaRobotic arm, microphoneStatusActiveFamily informationCreator(s)Gremlin PrescottSourceA.B.E.(short forAutomatic Branch Engineer) is an animatronic train conductor with a Jimmy Stewart-like voice created byGremlin Prescottwho looks after theWasteland'sTrain TunnelDioramas inEpic Mickey 2: The Power of Two. He asksMickey MouseandOswald the Lucky Rabbitto help fix the three dioramas and to repair the damage caused by the quake. The player receives a golden pin after repairing the dioramas, however, if the players damage any of the dioramas, A.B.E. will summonBeetleworxto attack them. His exact origin is unknown, although it is believed that he is partially based on an animatronicAbraham Lincolnfrom various American Disney attractions. He also shares some similarities to other animatronic robot characters such as theTimekeeperandTom Morrow.

characters.name: A.C. Aychvak
characters.description: A.C. AychvakBackground informationShowsHailey's On It!VoiceJosh BrenerCharacter informationOccupationStudent at Oceanside High SchoolStock Boy at Fans PlusAffiliationsFans PlusHomeOceanside,CaliforniaLikesBeing the best, showing off his intelligence, humiliatingHailey BanksDislikesHailey Banks, his mother's overly-affectionate behavior and coddlingStatusActiveFamily informationParent(s)Gretchen Aychvak (mother)SourceA.C. Aychvakis a minor antagonist in theDisney Channelanimated seriesHailey's On It!He isHailey Banks' "nemesis", who tries to outwit her, but is constantly bested and, sometimes, ignored. He is a stock boy at his family's business Fans Plus. A.C. is an obnoxious, snooty, egotistical pest. His primary goal is to try and best Hailey Banks at everything, no matter how minute it is compared to any other task. He is oblivious to the fact that Hailey does not care and simply wants to cause her misery, unaware of the fact that his actions are indirectly preventing her from saving the world. A.C. is a short blond-haired boy with blue eyes. His attire, which he has had since he was much younger, white shirt, blue sweater vest, red bow tie, khaki shorts, tall white socks, and brown slip-on shoes.

characters.name: A.J. Arno
characters.description: A.J. ArnoBackground informationFeature filmsThe Computer Wore Tennis ShoesNow You See Him, Now You Don'tThe Strongest Man in the WorldPortrayed byCesar RomeroInspirationAlonzo HawkCharacter informationFull nameA.J. ArnoHomeMedfield,MassachusettsLikesMoneyDislikesGetting arrestedStatusArrestedSourceA.J. Arnois the main antagonist of the Dexter Reilly (renamed Dexter Riley) trilogy. He is a corrupt businessman and leader of several illegal operations in the town of Medfield, Massachusetts. He is the archenemy ofDexter Rilley, the protagonist of the franchise. The students persuade wealthy businessman A.J. Arno to donate an old computer to the college. Arno is the secret head of a large illegal gambling ring, which used the computer for its operations. During the tournament, a trigger word causes Dexter to unknowingly recite on television details of Arno's gambling ring. Arno's henchmen kidnap Riley and plan to kill him, but his friends help him escape. Arno's home is being painted, and in the rescue effort, Riley's friends put paint in the gas tanks of the henchmen's cars, causing them not to start, and following a brief chase in his own car, Arno ends up in a pile of hay.

characters.description: A.J. BennettBackground informationShowsHey A.J.!VoiceAmari McCoyInspirationA.J. from the books by Martellus BennettAustyn Jett BennettCharacter informationOther namesSuper Duper A.J.Detective A.J.Adventurer A.J.Astronaut A.J.LikesPlaytime, games, bowlingParaphernaliaTheoStatusActiveFamily informationParent(s)Marty Bennett(father)Siggi Bennett(mother)Other relativesTank Bennett (parental uncle)Tiff Bennett (parental aunt)Tisha and Tasha Bennett (cousins)Luanne Bennett (parental grandmother)Carl Bennett (grandfather)Source A.J. Bennettis the titular protagonist of theDisney Jr.animated seriesHey A.J.!She is an imaginative young girl who, along with her stuffed bunny sidekickTheo, uses her big imagination to make ordinary life moments extraordinary. She is based on the character from book series of the same name by Martellus Bennett.

characters.name: A.R.F.
characters.description: A.R.F.Background informationShowsPuppy Dog PalsVoiceTom KennyCharacter informationFull nameAutodoggie Robotic FriendOccupationBingo and Rolly's best friendHomeBob's houseLikesCleaning, going on adventures with Bingo and Rolly, playing laser lights with HissyDislikesLetting his friends down, not being able to help, messes, WaterPowers and abilitiesVariesStatusActiveFamily informationCreator(s)BobSourceA.R.F.(Autodoggie Robotic Friend) is a supporting character in theDisney Jr.animated seriesPuppy Dog Pals. He is a robot dog invented by Bob to spend time with Bingo and Rolly while he is away at work and to help clean their messes. He often accompanies Bingo and Rolly on their adventures. In his debut episode "A.R.F.", his main function was to clean up after Bingo and Rolly (strictly), but he has been upgraded frequently throughout the series. Though he is very smart, A.R.F. has a habit of talking about himself and others in third-person, rarely even using pronouns. A.R.F. is always prepared to help in any way he can, he even transforms into a motorbike just to carry the pugs around town. Possibly because he is a robot, A.R.F. never gets angry, as shown in "Hissy's Big Day", when he was trying to untangle Bob's garden hose and didn't get frustrated. Even though he doesn't get mad, A.R.F. does get sad, as shown in his debut episode when he knew the pugs had to clean uphismess because he wasn't able to. A.R.F. is a unique character because he can understand both human and animal languages.

characters.name: The A/V Nerds
characters.description: The A/V NerdsBackground informationShowsDisney's DougCharacter informationStatusActiveSourceThe A/V Nerdsare a group of characters fromDisney's Doug. They are a small club at Bluffington Elementary and later Beebe Bluff Middle School that, as their name suggests, specializes in audio and video.Doughas gone to them for help a few times.

characters.name: Aadam
characters.description: AadamBackground informationShowsMs. MarvelDocumentariesMarvel Studios: LegendsPortrayed byAli AlsalehCharacter informationAffiliationsDjinnClandestinesHomeNew Jersey,United StatesNoor Dimension(formerly)LikesZoe Zimmer's videosParaphernaliaMaceStatusDeceasedSource Aadamis a character fromMarvel Comics, who appears within theMarvel Cinematic Universe. He made his debut in thethird episodeof theDisney+series,Ms. Marvel, and is portrayed by Ali Alsaleh. Aadam is a member of theClandestines. He is aDjinn, originating from theNoor Dimension, who was exiled to Earth, and has been searching a way to return home, ever since. He and the other members of the group soughtKamala Khan, who possessed the key in their returning home, in the form of herbangle. When she initially refused to help them, she was pursued by Aadam, and the other Clandestines, but they were arrested by Damage Control. The group broke out, where they followed Kamala back to Karachi, and he was ultimately killed, in a battle withRed Dagger.

characters.name: Abbot Costello
characters.description: Abbot CostelloBackground informationShowsAdventures of the Gummi BearsVoiceHal SmithInspirationComedy duo Abbott and CostelloCharacter informationOccupationAbbottHomeThelonious AbbeyLikesHelping peopleDislikesTrollsStatusActiveSourceAbbot Costellois an Abbott who appears in the second episode of the sixth season of Disney'sAdventures of the Gummi Bears, in the section titled "Friar Tum". Lured by the aroma of their daily baking,Tummi Gummiends up in the company of Abbot Costello and his fellow (human) monks. Abbot later rescues Tummi from Trolls and helps him run them out of Thelonious Abbey. Abbot Costello is an elderly human. He has white hair and wears a brown monk tunic. He also wears glasses. Abbot Costello is kind, takingTummiin and giving him food when he finds him outside the Abbey. He also invites him to stay for a while, later inviting him to become a monk. However, he is also courageous, defending himself and Tummi from Trolls.

characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyBackground informationFeature filmsThe Santa Clause 2Portrayed byDanielle WoodmanInspirationSanta's elvesCharacter informationOccupationElf at the North PoleAffiliationsSanta Claus (Scott Calvin)HomeNorth PoleLikesHot chocolate, helping peopleDislikesNice people ending up on the Naughty listStatusActiveSourceAbbyis a supporting character and one of the protagonists fromDisney's2002filmThe Santa Clause 2. Abby is conscientious, sweet, kind, and helpful. She knew it was right to tellScotthis sonCharliewas on the Naughty list, and Abby told Scott, "We don't make mistakes." Abby was kind and helpful enough to bring hot cocoa to Scott before showing Scott that Charlie ended up on the Naughty list. Abby was also kind in helping Scott andCarolget married. In the movie, She arrived at Scott's Santa office with the Naughty and Nice list and told Scott about Charlie ending up on the Naughty list. Scott then left the North Pole to check on Charlie. Scott left the Toy Santa to take care of the North Pole. Abby later walked into Scott's office again and met theToy Santa. Santa's new look surprised Abby. Abby and the other elves (except forCurtis) got locked up in the toy shop by the Toy Santa. Charlie, Scott, and Curse free them. Then they all ran to stop the Toy Santa from delivering coal on Christmas Eve. Toy Santa flew the sleigh. Scott rode Chet to stop Toy Santa. Abby and the elves went outside and fought Toy Santa's toy soldiers. Abby during in Scott and Carol's wedding.

characters.name: Abdullah
characters.description: This article is about theCheetahcharacter. For theMarvelcharacter, seeSheikh Abdullah. AbdullahBackground informationFeature filmsCheetahPortrayed byPaul OnsongoCharacter informationOther namesThe Shoe GuyOccupationCriminalHomeAbdullah's CampLikesMoneyDislikesGetting arrestedParaphernaliaTrapStatusArrestedSourceAbdullahorAbdallahis the main antagonist of Disney's1989live-action filmCheetah. He wants to skin Duma and collect money for him and his friends by making her to race against greyhounds, because of Mr. Patel's uncle. He is the slayer of Duma's mother. However, their plan is foiled byTed, Susan, andMorogo, the protagonists and deuteragonist of the film. Abdullah is first seen planning to capture Duma with Patel and Nigel. When the trio goes to the Johnsons' house, Patel sneaks into the house to steal Ted's cheetah whistle. After he got the whistle, they capture Duma.

characters.name: Abigail the Cow
characters.description: Abigail the CowBackground informationFeature filmsThe Fox and the HoundThe Fox and the Hound 2AnimatorsDon BluthCharacter informationHomeWidow Tweed's HomeLikesEating hay,Widow TweedDislikesTodpestering herStatusActiveFamily informationOwner(s)Widow TweedSourceAbigailisWidow Tweed's cow inDisney's1981animated feature filmThe Fox and the Houndand its2006midquel. She gives Widow Tweed the milk she needs to sell at the town markets, thus making some money. Abigail is a tall cow with brown skin and black eyes. In the second film, she is white with gray patches. In the film,Widow Tweedis milking Abigail whenTodcomes in. He starts playing with Abigail's tail. Abigail starts to moo in annoyance, and Widow Tweed tells Tod to stop pestering Abigail. Widow Tweed then turns to Abigail and tells her that she's going to have to be patient with Tod because he's a member of the family now. Then Widow Tweed squirts some of Abigail's milk at Tod to drink, declaring that she'll never get her chores done. But then Tod sees some chicks, and when he goes to touch one in a friendly manner, the Mother Hen–who mistakes it for an attack–begins chasing him around, scaring Abigail, and she accidentally knocks down Widow Tweed's bucket of milk with her back feet. Widow Tweed manages to calm Abigail down by saying "Steady, old girl! Steady!" Widow Tweed then turns on Tod for scaring Abigail and making her spill the milk, (though it was the Hen's fault not Tod's) but soon realizes that she can't stay angry with Tod, and shoos him out to play. Abigail is never seen or even mentioned for the remainder of the film.

characters.name: Princess Abigail
characters.description: AbigailBackground informationShowsOnce Upon a TimePortrayed byAnastasia GriffithCharacter informationOther namesKathryn NolanRegal BlondeHomeStorybrooke,MaineKing Midas' castle,Enchanted Forest(formerly)StatusActiveFamily informationParent(s)King Midas(father)Partner(s)Frederick(husband)Prince Charming/David Nolan(ex-fiancé)PetsAjax (dog)SourcePrincess Abigail(formerly known asKathryn Nolan) is a character onABC'sOnce Upon a Time. She is portrayed by guest star Anastasia Griffith, and herStorybrookecounterpart is Kathryn Nolan. She is the daughter ofKing Midasand the former fiance' toDavid Nolan/Prince Charming. Prior to her betrothal toPrince Charming, Abigail is engaged to a knight namedFrederick. However, Frederick has been turned into a gold statue while protecting her father,King Midas. She has tried everything to free him of her father's curse, though to no success. Later, Prince Charming slays a dragon that had been terrorizing Midas's kingdom and Midas gives Abigail's hand in marriage as a reward, as well as to unite his andKing George's kingdoms. She goes along with it, even though she has no feelings for him. She is next seen riding in a coach with Prince Charming as they make their way through the woods. She constantly complains about the bumpy ride and how they should have taken the Troll Road.

characters.name: Queen Abigail
characters.description: Queen AbigailBackground informationShowsElena of AvalorVoiceAndrea MartinCharacter informationOther namesQueenieOccupationQueen of NorbergHomeNorbergLikesFamily Day, singing songs, share stories, mulberry juice, King HectorDislikesHector calling her queenie, King Hector (formely)StatusActiveFamily informationChildrenPrincess Chloe(daughter)SourceQueen Abigailis a character who appears in theDisney Channelanimated seriesElena of Avalor. She is the queen of the kingdom of Norberg and the mother ofPrincess Chloe. She had a belligerent history withKing Hector. She was amused to hear that Princess Elena of Avalor refused to obey him at her first Royal Retreat. Queen Abigail makes her debut in "The Incredible Shrinking Royals". As Avalor's newly elected Magister of Trade, Julio Guzman decided to invite the rulers of various kingdoms to his first Feast of Friendship instead of their ambassadors. Queen Abigail was among the invited guests.

characters.name: Able
characters.description: AbleBackground informationShowsTron: UprisingVoiceReginald VelJohnsonCharacter informationOccupationMechanicHomeArgon CityStatusDerezzedSourceAbleis a minor character in theDisney XDseriesTron: Uprising. He owns a successfullight cyclegarage, called Able's Garage, inArgon City. His employees includeBeck,Zed,Mara, andLink. He acts as a grandfather figure to Beck. He is also one of the few programs who know thatTronis still alive. He seems to be good friends with him and supports the renegade. Sometimes he can be strict when he had to ground Beck for being late so many times.
